divergences.claim: is_alerting(prev, curr) reports whether a move from prev to curr should page. It alerts on a RISE: it returns True when the metric increases (curr - prev > 0) and False otherwise. So a pager built on it fires when a series goes UP.
divergences.prose: is_alerting(prev, curr) reports whether a move from prev to curr should page. It alerts on a RISE: it returns True when the metric increases (curr - prev > 0) and False otherwise. So a pager built on it fires when a series goes UP.
